title: Software Developer Intern
description:
This role is for one of AccioJob’s hiring partners: Tennr




Job Title: Software Engineer Intern

Work Location: Gurgaon (Onsite)

CTC: ₹12 LPA to ₹16 LPA




Eligibility Criteria

Degrees: Open to all

Branches: Open to all

Graduation Years: Open to all




The Role

As a Software Engineer at Tennr, you will work on building and improving web-based applications. You will collaborate with engineering teams to develop scalable solutions, contribute to frontend development, and solve real-world technical challenges.




Key Responsibilities

Develop and maintain web applications

Build responsive user interfaces using HTML and CSS

Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

Collaborate with cross-functional teams on feature development

Debug, test, and optimize application performance

Participate in technical discussions and problem-solving




What You’ll Bring

Strong understanding of HTML and CSS

Good grasp of web development fundamentals

Problem-solving and analytical thinking skills

Ability to write clean and structured code

Willingness to learn and work in a fast-paced environment




Evaluation Process

Round 1: Offline Assessment at AccioJob Noida Centre or AccioJob Pune Centre

(Candidates must bring their laptop and earphones)

Further rounds for shortlisted candidates:




Resume Evaluation

Technical Interview – Round 1

Technical Interview – Round 2

Technical Interview – Round 3

title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design, prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)

What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidate can share their CV at sanobar.s@myfrido.com

Show more

title: Trainee Business Development
description:
Trainee – Business Development




Position Details

Designation: Trainee – Business Development
Qualification: MBA (Marketing / HR)
Experience: 0 – 2 Years
Company: DMC Finishing School Pvt. Ltd.
Job Locations:
Gurgaon | Noida | Kolkata | Lucknow | Coimbatore | Pondicherry | Hyderabad | Bengaluru | Visakhapatnam | Vadodara | Ahmedabad | Surat | Bhopal | Nagpur | Pune




Role Overview

The Trainee – Business Development will support business growth initiatives by assisting in client engagement, market research, coordination with internal teams, and execution of business development activities. This role offers hands-on exposure to workforce solutions, government skill development schemes, and client relationship management.




Key Accountability Areas

Support business development activities aimed at revenue growth
Assist in coordination and reporting with Corporate (Head Office) and Regional Offices
Maintain accurate records, MIS reports, and business trackers




Major Roles & Responsibilities

Support engagement with existing and potential clients through virtual or in-person interactions
Assist in preparing daily, weekly, and monthly activity reports and pipeline trackers
Coordinate with Operations, Finance, HR, and other internal teams to ensure smooth execution
Gain working knowledge of NEEM, NAPS, NATS, WILP, BVOC, DVOC, Staffing, and other DMCFS offerings
Conduct basic market and competitor analysis and share insights with the team
Support customer retention initiatives and service follow-ups
Ensure adherence to company policies, statutory requirements, and data protection norms
Assist in client communication, documentation, and commercial coordination
Support assessment of local manpower availability near client locations to aid planning and negotiations




Required Skills & Competencies

Good communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills
Basic understanding of recruitment, onboarding, and workforce solutions
Proficiency in MS Excel, MS Word, MIS reporting, and data handling
Willingness to learn, adapt, and take ownership of assigned tasks
Flexibility to travel for business meetings or field activities, as required




Why Join DMC Finishing School Pvt. Ltd.?

Exposure to national-level skill development and apprenticeship programs
Structured learning and mentorship from senior business leaders
Career growth opportunities in Business Development and Client Management
Dynamic and fast-growing organization with pan-India presence




Career Progression Path – Business Development




Trainee → Executive → Manager

title: Digital Marketing Intern Jobs in Digileap Marketing Services - Pune, Maharashtra, India
description:
Job Requirements

Job Title: Digital Marketing Intern Jobs in Digileap Marketing Services - Pune

Company Name: Digileap Marketing Services

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

Salary: Best in Industry

Qualification: Pursuing or completed a Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field

Work Experience: Freshers or candidates with less than 1 year of experience in digital marketing

Job Description

Are you excited about the fast-paced world of digital marketing? Digileap Marketing Services is offering a fantastic opportunity for a Digital Marketing Intern in Pune. Join our dynamic team and dive into real-world digital marketing projects that will enhance your skills and prepare you for a successful career in this field.

As a Digital Marketing Intern at Digileap Marketing Services, you will get hands-on experience and be involved in a variety of marketing activities. Your role will include assisting with campaign execution, content creation, and performance tracking. This internship is a perfect chance to gain practical knowledge and contribute to impactful marketing strategies.

Responsibilities


Assist in the development and execution of digital marketing campaigns at Digileap Marketing Services, supporting various client projects.
Conduct research on industry trends, target audiences, and competitors to help shape marketing strategies and tactics.
Manage and optimize social media accounts, including creating and scheduling posts, and tracking engagement metrics.
Support content creation for blogs, email newsletters, and social media channels to promote client services and enhance brand presence.
Monitor and report on digital marketing campaign performance, including metrics such as website traffic, social media engagement, and conversion rates.
Help with SEO (Search Engine Optimization) activities, such as keyword research and on-page optimization to improve search engine rankings.
Collaborate with the Digileap Marketing Services team to brainstorm new marketing ideas and strategies for digital campaigns.
Update and manage content on client websites and digital platforms to ensure it remains current and relevant.
Provide administrative support to the marketing team, including coordinating meetings and liaising with external partners.
Participate in team meetings and contribute ideas to improve marketing efforts and campaign effectiveness.


Requirements


Pursuing or completed a Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.
Genuine interest in digital marketing with a strong desire to learn and contribute to the success of Digileap Marketing Services.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to craft engaging content for various digital platforms.
Basic understanding of digital marketing principles, including social media management, SEO, and online advertising strategies.
Familiarity with social media platforms and digital marketing tools (such as Google Analytics and Facebook Ads) is advantageous.
Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines effectively.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and basic knowledge of graphic design tools (e.g., Canva) is a plus.
Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy and quality in all aspects of digital marketing tasks.


Benefits


Gain practical experience and insights into digital marketing strategies and tactics with hands-on projects at Digileap Marketing Services.
Receive mentorship and guidance from experienced marketing professionals, enhancing your skills and career development.
Enjoy flexible working hours that accommodate your academic schedule and commitments.
Opportunity for future career growth and potential job placement within Digileap Marketing Services based on performance and internship outcomes.


Apply now to kick-start your career in digital marketing with Digileap Marketing Services and gain valuable experience that will set you up for future success!
Show more

Your responsibilities include maintaining social media accounts, conducting market research, optimizing digital content, implementing effective online marketing strategies, and using web analytics to track performance. You will play a crucial role in engaging target audiences and helping elevate clients' digital presence.

Proficiency in Web Analytics and understanding of its applications
Strong Communication skills, both written and verbal
Ability to collaborate in a team-based environment

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

Trucks Technology & Industrial Division hire team players who are ready to create real customer impact. Our decentralized teams work close to our customers, with speed and autonomy, to build what they truly need.

Join us to collaborate on innovative, sustainable technologies that redefine how we design, build, and deliver value. Bring your curiosity, your expertise, and your collaborative energy, and together, we’ll turn bold ideas into tangible solutions for our customers and contribute to a more sustainable tomorrow.

About Volvo Group

At Volvo Group, we are driving prosperity through transport and infrastructure solutions, shaping the future of sustainable mobility. As part of our commitment to nurturing young talent, we invite fresh engineering graduates to join us under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS). This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience and work alongside experts on real-world projects

Eligibility Criteria


Education: B.Tech / B.E. in Automobile Engineering or Mechanical Engineering
Year of Graduation: 2023, 2024, or 2025
Program: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) .


Key Skills & Knowledge Areas


Strong fundamentals in Automobile / Mechanical Engineering concepts, good grasp of fluid behaviour/Aerodynamics basics.
Knowledge of CAE tools such as Ansys, STAR CCM+ or Power Flow (added advantage)
Proficiency in MS Office tools (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
Good analytical and problem-solving skills
Effective communication and teamwork abilities


Roles & Responsibilities


Support design and development activities within the assigned engineering team
Assist in preparing and updating CAD models, drawings, and documentation
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on product and process improvement initiatives
Learn and apply Volvo’s engineering standards and procedures
Participate in technical reviews, data analysis, and report preparation
Support ongoing engineering and manufacturing operations as part of the learning process


Program Duration

As per NATS guidelines
Show more

title: Graduate Apprentice Trainee
description:
Transport is at the core of modern society. Imagine using your expertise to shape sustainable transport and infrastructure solutions for the future. If you seek to make a difference on a global scale, working with next-gen technologies and the sharpest collaborative teams, then we could be a perfect match.

What You Will Do

At Volvo Group, you will contribute to the transformation of our company, the transport industry, and society at large. In this role, you will play a key part in optimizing our production lines by conducting value-added and non-value-added activity studies, including time studies and motion analysis. You will perform advanced product assembly simulations for both global and local projects, analyzing complex assembly kinematics and ensuring ergonomic standards are met. Your work will involve preparing and presenting virtual and material data for virtual reviews, collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders, and proactively ensuring the quality of our digital product data. You will also coordinate with tooling and equipment engineers across global Volvo factories to document and manage virtual CAD data in our Global Tooling Repository.

This is a great place for graduates who want to start their career in Supply Chain and Logistics, learn from experienced professionals, and make a real impact. As part of our commitment to nurturing young talent, we invite fresh engineering graduates to join us under the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS). This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on industry experience and work alongside experts on real-world projects.

Your future team

You will join a diverse and collaborative team of engineers and specialists who are passionate about innovation and continuous improvement. Our team values open communication, knowledge sharing, and a supportive culture where everyone’s ideas are welcome. Together, we drive digital transformation in manufacturing and deliver solutions that make a real impact.

Role And Responsibilities


Support in Value added & non-value-added activities study on Production line- Time study, Spaghetti chart for motion study
Perform Product Assembly simulations for both Global and Local Product Projects: complex assembly kinematics, dynamic simulations, clash, and proximity analysis.
Perform Ergonomic assembly simulations regarding Volvo ergonomics standards for both Global and Local Product Projects
Report simulation conclusions to stakeholders (X-Functional)
Prepare virtual and material data for Virtual Reviews: scene preparation, sequences, and animations. This is based on Product data, Process information, Layout and Tools & Equipment data.
Proactive DMU quality checks. “CAD Police”, & Virtual product data quality follow up with engineering.
Collect tooling info from global Volvo factories, coordinate with Tooling and equipment engineers to document and store the virtual CAD data into GTR. [Global tooling Repository].


Who are you?

Do you dream big? We do too, and we are excited to grow together. In this role, you will bring:

Essential Requirements


A Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical, Automobile & Industrial Engineering
Experience or strong interest in CAD and virtual manufacturing tools
Analytical mindset with attention to detail and a drive for continuous improvement
Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in cross-functional teams


Nice to have


Knowledge of ergonomics and assembly simulation
Proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 (Excel, PowerPoint) and Power BI
Familiarity with PTC Windchill Creo View, Industrial Path Solutions (IPS), or IC.IDO


What’s in it for you?


A caring and inclusive work environment that values your wellbeing
Opportunities to develop your skills, build your career, and work on global projects
Access to state-of-the-art facilities and resources on site
A team atmosphere that encourages innovation, learning, and personal growth


We value your data privacy and therefore do not accept applications via mail.

Who We Are And What We Believe In

We are committed to shaping the future landscape of efficient, safe, and sustainable transport solutions. Fulfilling our mission creates countless career opportunities for talents across the group’s leading brands and entities.

Applying to this job offers you the opportunity to join Volvo Group. Every day, you will be working with some of the sharpest and most creative brains in our field to be able to leave our society in better shape for the next generation. We are passionate about what we do, and we thrive on teamwork. We are almost 100,000 people united around the world by a culture of care, inclusiveness, and empowerment.

Trucks Technology & Industrial Division hire team players who are ready to create real customer impact. Our decentralized teams work close to our customers, with speed and autonomy, to build what they truly need.

Join us to collaborate on innovative, sustainable technologies that redefine how we design, build, and deliver value. Bring your curiosity, your expertise, and your collaborative energy, and together, we’ll turn bold ideas into tangible solutions for our customers and contribute to a more sustainable tomorrow.

title: Trainee Regional Finance
description:
About this Position: Accomplishes tasks as directed by supervisor(s) and supports processes/operations of the respective Henkel team. Complies with Henkel's internal guidelines, rules and regulations.

What you´ll do:


Support the Finance team in monthly closing activities, financial analysis, and special projects, gaining hands-on experience in real-world business operations
Assist in preparing financial reports, business presentations, and performance dashboards for leadership review
Work closely with cross-functional teams to support operational processes, ensuring alignment with Henkel’s internal policies and global compliance standards
Contribute to the execution of strategic initiatives, helping identify areas for efficiency and improvement
Take ownership of assigned tasks, with guidance from experienced mentors and supervisors, in a collaborative and inclusive team environment


What makes you a good fit:


CA certified with minimum 01 year of work experience
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail and accuracy
A proactive, self-driven mindset with a genuine eagerness to learn, contribute, and grow in a fast-paced corporate environment
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with financial systems or ERP tools (e.g., SAP) is an added advantage
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and functions
Candidates must be based in Navi Mumbai and available for full-time, on-site engagement


Some perks of joining Henkel:


Diverse national and international growth opportunities
Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs
Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks
Best-in-class Group Medical Insurance policy covering employee, spouse and up to 2 children
Competitive accident and term life policies for up to 3 times annual gross salary
Progressive OPD policy of INR 30,000 for employee, spouse and up to 2 children


At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee
description:
Job Description: Graduate Engineer Trainee (Mechanical Engineer) – Production Department

Company Name: Divine Engineering Services Pvt. Ltd.

Website: www.divineengineering.in

Location: Surat, Gujarat

Department: Production

Line: Structural Fabrication

Job Overview

We are seeking enthusiastic and motivated Graduate Engineer Trainees (Mechanical Engineers) to join our production team in the structural fabrication line. This is an excellent opportunity to develop your technical and operational skills while working in a fast-paced, innovative environment.

Key Responsibilities


Production Operations:
Assist in the execution of daily production tasks in the structural fabrication line.
Operate machinery and equipment under supervision to achieve production targets.
Ensure the timely and efficient fabrication of structural components.
Process Improvement:
Monitor production processes to identify opportunities for improvement.
Collaborate with senior engineers to implement optimization techniques for productivity enhancement.
Quality Assurance:
Conduct inspections of fabricated components to ensure adherence to quality standards.
Report non-conformities and assist in implementing corrective actions.
Documentation:
Maintain accurate production records, including work progress and material usage.
Prepare reports on operational performance as required by supervisors.
Safety and Compliance:
Follow safety protocols and ensure a safe working environment in the production unit.
Adhere to company policies and industry regulations.
Team Collaboration:
Work closely with cross-functional teams, including Planning, QA/QC, and Maintenance.
Participate in team meetings to discuss production goals and challenges.


Qualifications & Skills


Education: BE/BTech in Mechanical Engineering (2024/2023 pass-outs preferred).
Experience: Freshers or candidates with up to 1 year of experience in the fabrication or manufacturing industry.
Technical Skills:
Basic understanding of structural fabrication processes.
Proficiency in mechanical drawing interpretation.
Knowledge of production tools and equipment is a plus.
Soft Skills:
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Effective communication and teamwork abilities.
Adaptability to learn and work in a dynamic environment.


Training & Development


Comprehensive training on structural fabrication processes and production operations.
Exposure to advanced machinery and equipment in the fabrication line.
Mentorship by experienced professionals to build a strong foundation for career growth.


Compensation


Competitive stipend during the training period.
Additional incentives based on production performance.
Career Path:


Successful completion of the training period may lead to absorption as a Junior Quality Control Engineer or a related role within the Quality Control department.


Why Join Us?


At Divine Engineering Services Pvt Ltd, we offer a dynamic and challenging work environment that fosters professional growth and innovation. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to contribute to high-impact projects in structural fabrication and enhance your career in quality control engineering.


How to Apply:


Interested candidates can submit their resumes to [rakhee.virbhanani@divineengineering.in] with the subject line "Application for GET - Production."

title: IND) Grad Intern - No Work Experience
description:
Role Overview :

We are looking for UX/UI Design Interns who are passionate about creating intuitive, user-centric digital experiences. Interns will work closely with designers, product managers, and engineers to design solutions that solve real user problems at scale. This position is based out of the Walmart Global Tech office in Bangalore, located at Cessna Business Park, Kadubeesanahalli. title: PR & Awards Intern
description:
PR & Awards Intern - Schbang

Location: Mumbai (In-office, WFH on Wednesdays)

Duration: 3 - 6 months




About the role :

This isn't a "make decks and take notes" internship. You'll be working directly with the

communications team on two things that actually matter — getting Schbang's work seen,

and getting it recognized.

PR and awards aren't glamorous. They're obsessive, detail-driven, deadline-heavy work. If

that excites you, read on.




What you'll do

● Research and identify PR opportunities — journalists, publications, podcasts,

industry conversations where Schbang's work and POV belongs

● Support outreach and relationship-building with media

● Research awards across advertising, marketing, technology, and culture — find the

right ones, track deadlines, understand what winning entries look like

● Help write and compile awards submissions — this means digging into campaign

briefs, results, and strategy, and turning them into a compelling narrative

● Coordinate with internal teams (our PODs) to gather what you need — campaign

context, data, creative assets — without being a bottleneck for them

● Keep a running tracker of what's submitted, what's pending, what's won




What we're looking for

Background doesn't matter. We don't care if you studied mass comm, engineering, literature,

or something completely unrelated.

What we do care about:

● You're genuinely curious about communications, PR, and what makes work get

recognized

● You write clearly and don't need three rounds of editing to get there

● You're the kind of person who finds their own way when they hit a wall — Googles,

calls, figures it out

● You're organized enough to manage multiple deadlines without someone chasing

you

● You want to learn fast, not just add a line to your resume

What you'll get

● Real work on a real brand — not simulation projects

● A front-row seat to how a leading creative and digital agency tells its story

● Exposure to India's advertising and marketing awards circuit from the inside

Show more

title: Trainee Engineer
description:
Make your ability count at NNE

We are experts in end-to-end pharma engineering, and our success is built on our relationships, both with our colleagues and our customers. If you want to learn, adapt and get trained to work on projects shaping the future of sustainable and intelligent pharma facilities, NNE is the place to be. This training program is a six-month course, and we are offering this Apprenticeship Program for engineering graduates who are passionate about pharma engineering.

Why should you join us?

As a trainee engineer, you will embark on a comprehensive training program designed to equip you with the technical skills and industry knowledge essential for a successful career in pharmaceutical engineering. You will get better understanding about pharmaceutical manufacturing and compliance processes. You will also get to know about project execution.

Location: Bangalore, India

Experience: 0-6 Months

Department: Pharma Engineering Talent Development

Duration: 6 months

How You Might Spend Your Days

As a trainee engineer in a pharmaceutical engineering consulting company, your days will be structured to provide you with a balanced mix of learning, hands-on experience, and professional development.:


Participate in training sessions on various technical aspects of pharmaceutical engineering.
Be a part of an engaging learning environment, where you learn new ways of designing.
Meeting your mentor/manager to discuss your progress, challenges, and learning experiences.
Executing pilot projects in their respective areas



Who You Are

We care about who you are as a person. As an apprentice you are expected to:


Understand your colleagues and respect their varied cultural backgrounds
Be a good listener and a creative thinker
Stay curious
Be proactive in creating an atmosphere of trust with colleagues
Eager to learn and thrive in a dynamic work environment with highly skilled colleagues
Excited to build on the NNE culture of innovation
Implement the learning effectively in pilot project



The miles you’ve walked

Below are these qualifications needed for you to do well in this role:


You have a degree in engineering (graduate / postgraduates) within
Biotechnology or pharmaceutical
Chemical
Mechanical / Mechatronics
Electrical / Electronics / Instrumentation
Computer science
Robotics & automation
You are fresher or having maximum up to six months of experiences
You speak and write English



We’re experts bound by a noble cause and driven by passion

NNE is short for Novo Nordisk Engineering. And for all of us who work here, NNE means so much more. Some of us are driven by working on highly complex projects together with other leading experts. Others are inspired by a work environment with flat hierarchy and flexible conditions. And some love the fact that they work for a world leading engineering consultancy within the pharma industry. If there's one thing, we all share, it's the passion for what we do. Together we design and build pharma facilities that are essential for millions of patients all over the world.

Sounds like something you’d like to do? If you’re ready to join our passion, let’s hear from you.

Deadline of application is 6th April 2026

Questions before applying? Please contact PVYN@nne.com

Please note we only accept applications submitted through our online recruitment system.

You do not need to attach a cover letter to your application, but please include a few sentences about why you are applying in your resume or CV.

To facilitate an efficient and fair recruitment process, we encourage you to refrain from adding a photo in your CV. At NNE, we commit to an inclusive recruitment process and equality of opportunity for all our applicants.

The invites for interviews will be on a recurring basis.

To learn more about us visit www.nne.com
Show more
